title: narutofix
description: Provide narutomod with a ninja backpack for quick casting and repair of some unreasonable mechanisms
body:
### Items

#### sealscroll

Right click on the sealed item, right-click again to release the item, and store the consumed chakra of 100 Blacklist can be configured through configuration files

### Repair function

#### Sharingan

*   Cancel the displacement effect and only retain the damage free feature.
*   Fixed the issue of locking the target with the writing Sharingan and changed it to an O-key switch.

#### Command

*   The repair command to add chakra must be entered by the player
*   Fix the bug where the command adds a maximum limit of 100000 chakra, including the ability to drop chakra after death.

### New features added

#### New command

*   Add 9 tailed beasts at once，/locateEntity jinchuriki assign gedo 10

#### Ninja backpack

The new ninja backpack can store jutsuitem, Open with O-key. The top nine are jutsu hotbars. By default, G key use jutsu, and the power can be adjusted in configuration. Alt+number key/scroll wheel can switch the current jutsuitem, and pressing the switch key of the original mod can switch the current item's jutsu. Add Sharingan to store on the right side of the ninja backpack, generating a slot every 2000 ninja xp, in coordination with Izanagi. Quick jutsu CD with the same power.

*   now, cd can change in configfile

#### Izanagi

If there are Sharingans in the ninja backpack during death after opening with K-key, the eyes will be lost, immune death will occur, health will be restored, and all effects will be removed for three minutes.

#### Susanoo

*   Susanoo can stop the ride, You can use shift stop the ride Susanoo, It will follow you and attact your last attact entity.
*   Now, not to ride susanoo can change in config
*   You can use command /setcolor <color int> change Susanoo color.
*   Now, change susanoo color is ues RRGGBB like /setcolor FF0000 is red
*   Susanoo's second stage health doubles.

#### Sharingan

*   add 2 new Sharingan.
*   Sharingan is 1 when you first get, and it can upgrade per 1000 Chakra (can change in config), max is 3

#### Seal

*   You can ues SealingChains seal TailBeast in gamemode 0

#### other

*   Maybe you wan to build your NinjaRealm, try to use /toninjarealm
